title: Branch is-open chip
description: Colour-coded chip for the branch's live open/closed state. Respects both `status` (active/paused/closed) AND `is_open_now` (opening_hours + exceptions evaluated in branch.region.timezone). Consumed by the branch list, map view, hours editor, and edit screen.

isOpenNow.description: The evaluated is-open-now signal (respects opening_hours + exceptions). Ignored when status != 'active' — a paused/closed branch is always shown as closed.

nextTransitionAt.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp of the next open/close transition. Rendered as a subtitle when present (e.g. 'Closes at 22:00').

showLabel.description: When false, renders only the coloured indicator dot without text.

children.$expr: props.isOpenNow ? ('· Closes at ' + formatTime(props.nextTransitionAt)) : ('· Opens at ' + formatTime(props.nextTransitionAt))
